Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims dog mauled his cat to death. Then, woman claims she got duped for a knock off.
Video.title: Knocked off

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues her landlord for rent money. Then, man believes he was duped by a car seller.
Video.title: A Roach and a Lemon

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: First, daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle. Then, two sisters dispute car payments.
Video.title: Pain in the Cars

Video.summary: First, a dispute over the caring of horses. Then, plaintiff claims the defendant caused an accident.
Video.title: For the Love of Horses

Video.summary: Stacy claims her mom Sherry promised to support her in college. Sherry says she's jobless and can't afford her allowance.
Video.title: The Long Con

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for parking ticket. Then, a litigant disputes a breach of contract over an investment.
Video.title: Unsullied and Unpaid

Video.summary: First, a friendship is strained over money. Then, the plaintiff wants her money back from friend.
Video.title: The Root of All Evil

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims friend destroyed her car. Then, plaintiff claims money stolen from child’s shoebox.
Video.title: Grand Theft Shoe Box

Video.summary: First, a woman claims defendent sold her a broken car. Then, a plaintiff claims unpaid lones.
Video.title: M'lady of Maladies

Video.summary: First, a man sues estranged friend for an unpaid loan. Then, couple is suing for an unfinished remodeling job.
Video.title: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Image.alt: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Video.summary: An aunt says she lent her nephew money to fix his car, but he insists he never borrowed any money; an auto mechanic says a woman failed to provide a deposit on repairs and used his garage to store and hide her vehicle from being repossessed.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: A woman alleges that the defendants knowingly rented her a home that was fraught with bed bugs; a marriage gone bad has an ex-wife suing her ex-husband for a multitude of expenses.
Video.title: Bugged Lease

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-fiance split without paying his share of the bills; an attempt to help a homeless single mom went awry when, the plaintiff claims, the defendant nearly burned down her kitchen.
Video.title: Charred Intentions

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Theresa and Paul Cacciato are suing their former tenant, Theresa Kordulak, for $2,160, accusing her of damaging their furnace after leaving her pet grooming business. Kordulak denies the claim, stating the furnace never worked and countersues
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Furnace

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: Kathy is suing truck driver Doug for vehicular damages after claiming he illegally passed her on the right.
Video.title: Car Crash Crisis

Video.summary: Kathy is suing truck driver Doug for vehicular damages after claiming he illegally passed her on the right.
Video.title: Car Crash Crisis

Video.summary: Robert says he loaned the defendant money and she agreed to pay $100 a month in late fees until the loan was paid off, but took 43 extra months to pay it.
Video.title: 43 Months

Video.summary: Robert says he loaned the defendant money and she agreed to pay $100 a month in late fees until the loan was paid off, but took 43 extra months to pay it.
Video.title: 43 Months

Video.summary: Wayne says he purchased two jet skis from the defendant, Charles, who assured him they were in good, safe and working order. Wayne claims this was a total lie and the things are junk. He suing the liar in the name of justice for $1,790.41. Charles claims he fixed up the jet skis and Wayne checked them before buying. A few weeks later, he came back complaining about the engines, wanting a full refund after ruining perfectly good jet skis by running them improperly. Charles is accused of jettisoning a customer.
Video.title: Jettisoning a Customer

Video.summary: Theresa and Paul Cacciato are suing their former tenant, Theresa Kordulak, for $2,160, accusing her of damaging their furnace after leaving her pet grooming business. Kordulak denies the claim, stating the furnace never worked and countersues
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Furnace

Video.summary: Corinne sues ex-boss Walter for $5,000, claiming unpaid wages, harassment, and abuse. Walter denies the claims, asserting he paid her and countersues for $545.04, accusing her of a shakedown.
Video.title: Harassed by Her Boss?

Video.summary: Corinne sues ex-boss Walter for $5,000, claiming unpaid wages, harassment, and abuse. Walter denies the claims, asserting he paid her and countersues for $545.04, accusing her of a shakedown.
Video.title: Harassed by Her Boss?

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.
Video.title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Image.alt: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: First, a daughter refuses to pay her mother back. Then, the plaintiff claims that her ex took luxury purses.
Video.title: The Deadbeat Bag Snatcher

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for the sale of sick puppy. Then, a sister sues brother for his failure to pay for car.
Video.title: One Sick Puppy
